epigraph.quote: We walked around Conwy on the walls & saw an aquarium with lobsters & eels & went inside the smallest house in Britain.

per_stop.quote: After leaving Thomas, William & Peter we took John & Charles swimming
We walked around Conwy on the walls & saw an aquarium with lobsters & eels & went inside the smallest house in Britain.
We camped in the middle of nowhere, near a dam.
